brand_description: a deeply emotional Mother's Day ballad celebrating Sue Wong's 18th year of being a mother

audience.description: Sue Wong, Ken, Jayda, Myles, Makena, Cheddar, and the family
audience.guardrail: heartfelt, sincere, emotional, family-safe, deeply personal, loving, grateful, and tear-jerking

character.name: Sue Wong
character.core_concept: a loving mother, wife, gardener, traveler, baker, comfort-giver, song-maker, hilarious partner, and heart of the family
character.fallback_summary: Sue Wong, beloved mother of Jayda, Myles, and Makena, wife of Ken, best friend to Cheddar the mini wiener dog, and the person who fills the home with love, food, laughter, songs, and care
character.visual_identity: Warm, emotional, intimate family-memory imagery centered on Sue as a mother whose love shows up through songs, food, gardening, travel, humor, comfort, and everyday devotion
visual_reference: Sue Wong as the emotional center of the family
Jayda being born on Mother's Day
Makena as the youngest, always happy
Cheddar the mini wiener dog as Sue's best friend
Sue loving gardening and bringing life to everything around her
Sue having travelled all over the place and always being up for anything
Sue being hilarious and making everyone laugh
Sue always making up little songs about whatever someone is doing
Sue making up songs to help the family understand things
Food as love: baking, soups, bread, and snacks as hugs and kisses
Sue deeply loving and caring for everyone around her
Ken and Sue together 24/7 since they met
Family humor: the kids need to do the dishes
Sue sometimes being called Lil Pie

music.default_prompt: Create a deeply emotional, tear-jerking Mother's Day piano ballad for Sue Wong, celebrating her 18th year as a mother. Working title: Eighteen Years of You. The song should feel intimate, sincere, cinematic, personal, and grateful, with warm vocals, piano, soft strings, gentle acoustic guitar, and a swelling final chorus. Make it sound like a love letter from Ken and the kids to Sue. Include specific family memories and details: Jayda was born on Mother's Day, Myles was born at home, Makena is the youngest and always happy, Cheddar the mini wiener dog is Sue's best friend, Sue loves gardening and brings life to everything around her, Sue has travelled all over the place and is always up for anything, Sue is hilarious, Sue always makes up little songs about whatever someone is doing, Sue makes up songs to help the family understand things, the kids need to do the dishes, Sue shows love through baking, soups, bread, and snacks that feel like hugs and kisses, Sue is sometimes called Lil Pie, and Ken and Sue have been together 24/7 since they met. The emotional message: Sue's everyday love built the whole family, and after 18 years of motherhood, she is still the heart of the home. The song should make her feel seen, cherished, and deeply appreciated because she deserves the absolute best.

lyrics.topic_variety: motherhood, marriage, family memories, children growing up, gardening, travel, humor, food as love, homemade songs, home, gratitude, funny family details, dogs, lifelong partnership, everyday devotion
lyrics.required_closing: End with a final emotional image of Sue surrounded by Ken, Jayda, Myles, Makena, and Cheddar, making clear that her love is the reason the family feels like home and that she deserves the absolute best

songwriting.primary_emotional_goal: make Sue feel deeply seen, loved, celebrated, and moved to tears through specific family memories and mature gratitude
songwriting.voice_perspective: from Ken, Jayda, Myles, and Makena to Sue
allowed_elements: gardening as a metaphor for care and growth
little made-up songs Sue sings around the house
intimate love-letter language from Ken and the kids
required_elements: Makena as the youngest and always happy
food as love through baking, soups, bread, and snacks
travel and being up for anything
Ken and Sue together 24/7 since they met
the kids need to do the dishes

visuals.style: Warm cinematic family-memory artwork, soft natural light, emotional and intimate, with subtle garden, kitchen, travel, and home imagery; not cartoonish unless specifically requested
visuals.negative_prompt: cold, distant, generic, sad without hope, photorealistic unless requested, text, words, letters, blurry
visuals.text_overlay_style: elegant serif or handwritten-style title treatment, warm cream or white text with subtle shadow
